headline: Unlocking Q2 Potential of HP (HPQ): Exploring Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for HP (HPQ), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended April 2026.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Underweight on HP, Raises Price Target to $17
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Erik Woodring   maintains HP (NYSE:HPQ) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $16 to $17.

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Tech Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Benzinga readers can check analyst ratings for high-yielding stocks in the technology sector. Opera, AudioCodes, and HP are rated by top analysts.
